name: Tower Defense
description: Defend your base from waves of enemies! Place strategic towers and survive 20 waves.
title: Tower Defense

instructions.title: How to Play
instructions.placement: Select a tower type, then click a cell to place it
instructions.upgrades: Click an existing tower to upgrade or sell it
instructions.waves: Press Start Wave to begin the next wave of enemies
instructions.goal: Prevent enemies from reaching your base by building towers along their path
tips: Place towers near the path for maximum coverage
Mix tower types for balanced defense
Slow towers help other towers deal more damage
Save resources for upgrades between waves

towers.sniper_desc: High damage, long range, slow fire rate
towers.slow_desc: Slows enemies to help other towers
